full_text:
Deng Zhan 鄧展
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Deng Zhan (鄧展)was born in Nanyang. A noted weapons expert who discussed swordplay with Cao Pi. Deng Zhan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
